message: 🌱 Add flagger: Interaction of HPA + progressDeadlineSeconds flag can cause mission (#544)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flagger-944-interaction-of-hpa-progressdeadlineseconds-flag-can-cause-canary-fai",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flagger: Interaction of HPA + progressDeadlineSeconds flag can cause canary failure during peak times",
+    "description": "Interaction of HPA + progressDeadlineSeconds flag can cause canary failure during peak times. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flagger troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flagger deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger -n flagger --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flagger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flagger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger\nkubectl get configmap -n flagger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flagger\n```\nHi guys, we are having the following issue, currently. What is the suggested solution for this case?\n\n### Describe the issue\n\nFlagger doesn't progress the canary while the number of running pods is below expected -> OK."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Interaction of HPA + progressDeadlineSeconds flag can cause",
+        "description": "This pull request adds the `spec.analysis.canaryReadyThreshold` for configuring the percentage of canary workloads that must be available/ready before rollout can continue.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Interaction of HPA + progressDeadlineSeconds flag is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flagger -n flagger --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flagger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This pull request adds the `spec.analysis.canaryReadyThreshold` for configuring the percentage of canary workloads that must be available/ready before rollout can continue.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
